cloudClasses.description: Anvil preset names to route to the native provider (bypassing anvil). Default: ["planning"]. Used when ANVIL_CLOUD_CLASSES is unset; overridden by the env var when non-empty (comma-separated).

routeEndpoint.description: If set, POST to this URL (anvil's /v1/route, T007) for an authoritative local/cloud tier decision instead of the fast client-side keyword heuristic. Falls back to client-side on any error/timeout. Used when ANVIL_ROUTE_ENDPOINT is unset; overridden by the env var when non-empty. Leave unset (the default) for the zero-round-trip client-side path.
